titan.description: Configuration for the Titan orchestrator agent

prompt.description: Custom system prompt to replace the default Titan prompt

myrmidons.description: Myrmidon configurations. Each Myrmidon is a faster but more limited agent that Titan delegates work to.

children.description: DEPRECATED: use `myrmidons` instead. Retained for backwards compatibility. If both are set, `myrmidons` takes precedence.

maxResponseWords.description: Maximum word count enforced on each Myrmidon's final (one-paragraph) response to Titan. Keeps Titan's context lean. Defaults to 1000.

disabled_tools.description: Tool names to disable completely. Disabled tools are not registered with OpenCode.

maxSessionsPerAgent.description: Maximum concurrent background sessions per Myrmidon

model.description: Model ID for this Myrmidon (provider/model format)

speed.description: Relative speed of this agent (1=slowest, 10=fastest). Used by Titan to prioritize dispatch.

intelligence.description: Reasoning capability of this agent (1=limited, 10=strong). Used by Titan to match task complexity.

modelType.description: Model architecture type. 'dense' = slower but better at logic and complex reasoning. 'sparse' = faster, better at information gathering and broad search.

maxInstances.description: Maximum number of parallel instances Titan may run for this Myrmidon. Since instances share the same model (already loaded in the provider's VRAM), they can run concurrently on the same provider. Defaults to 1.

maxContextLength.description: Maximum context window (in tokens) this Myrmidon's model can handle before it is forced to compact or truncate its history. Optional — mainly relevant for locally hosted models with fixed context limits. When present, Titan uses it to avoid handing large or complex tasks to small-context workers.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name for this Myrmidon

provider.description: Provider identifier for this Myrmidon. Titan will not dispatch parallel tasks to Myrmidons sharing the same provider.

title: opencode-titan
description: Configuration schema for opencode-titan plugin — Titan orchestrator with parallel Myrmidons
